name: Buena Vista Park
summary_en: Buena Vista Park is documented from Board of Park Commissioners annual reports in 1895 and 1912 (noting sidewalk improvements and plantings) through a 1975 Open Space fund report funding children's play apparatus and a Recreation and Park capital plan listing a Buena Vista Park master plan. Neighborhood studies and environmental impact reports from 1978 to 1984 reference the park's slopes and views, while Recreation and Park Commission minutes and a 2006 Controller maintenance audit track trail-naming and upkeep. The park is operated by the Recreation and Park Department, whose FY2025 budget line totals about $250M; no place-specific contract appears in the data.
